title: peltobryon dichotomum
intro: Peltobryon dichotomum, also known as dichotomous peltobryon, is a type of pleurocarpous moss that belongs to the family Pylaisiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of peltobryon dichotomum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Peltobryon dichotomum can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction, often in combination with other herbs, to make a medicinal tea that can be consumed to harness its health benefits.
